Avaaya Infotech Private Limited

Innovating for a better tomorrow, delivering excellence today

Empowering Researchers, Advancing Higher Education Excellence

About Company

Avaaya Infotech Private Limited is a professional and research-oriented organization dedicated to promoting academic excellence, innovation, and knowledge development at both national and international levels. The company operates as an independent and dynamic entity, committed to supporting the research community through quality-driven and ethical practices. Avaaya Infotech collaborates with educational institutions, universities, colleges, schools, industries, and corporate organizations through Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) for academic exchange, knowledge partnership, and community development initiatives. The organization actively engages in organizing and promoting educational and professional events, as well as supporting the publication of high-quality research work. With a mission to strengthen the global research ecosystem, Avaaya Infotech provides non-profit-oriented academic support services, ensuring accessibility and quality for researchers, faculty members, and students. Its team comprises experienced academicians, trainers, and professionals who guide research scholars in enhancing the impact and relevance of their work for the betterment of society. The company regularly conducts conferences, seminars, symposiums, workshops, and training programs across diverse disciplines. It has successfully organized numerous national and international academic and corporate events in collaboration with reputed institutions. Additionally, Avaaya Infotech supports research publication initiatives, including journals with ISSN and books with ISBN, ensuring credibility and global recognition. Driven by a commitment to excellence, integrity, and innovation, Avaaya Infotech Private Limited continues to empower the academic and research community by providing comprehensive support, professional guidance, and impactful learning opportunities. We provide ethical research support, training, and publication guidance for PhD scholars and faculty.

Founder’s Message

At Avaaya Infotech Private Limited, our vision has always been to create a platform that empowers researchers, academicians, and students with the right knowledge, tools, and ethical guidance. We believe that quality research is the foundation of innovation and societal growth.

Our aim is not only to support research activities but to build a strong academic ecosystem where ideas are nurtured, skills are enhanced, and knowledge is shared globally. We are committed to delivering excellence through integrity, innovation, and continuous learning.

We welcome all aspiring researchers and institutions to collaborate with us in shaping a better academic and research-driven future.

Director’s Message

As a Director of Avaaya Infotech Private Limited, I strongly believe in bridging the gap between academic learning and practical research implementation. Our organization is dedicated to providing structured, ethical, and high-quality support to researchers at every stage of their journey.

We focus on enhancing research quality, improving publication standards, and developing professional competencies among scholars and faculty members. Through our initiatives, workshops, and collaborations, we aim to create meaningful academic impact.

We are continuously working towards building a research-oriented environment that supports innovation, critical thinking, and lifelong learning.

Vision & Mission

🌍
Our Vision
To become a leading global platform for research, innovation, and academic excellence by empowering researchers, institutions, and professionals with quality knowledge and ethical support systems.
🎯
Mission
To provide high-quality research guidance and academic support to scholars, faculty members, and institutions.
✅
To promote ethical research practices, innovation-driven learning, and academic excellence.
🎓
To organize workshops, conferences, seminars, FDPs, and research training programs across disciplines.
📘
To support publication in reputed journals and strengthen research visibility at national and international levels.
🤝
To build strong collaborations among academia, industry, and research communities for meaningful impact.

Empower Researchers

Create Global Academic Impact

Jyoti Kumari

Jyoti Kumari serves as Director at Avaaya Infotech Private Limited. She contributes to the organization with dedication, leadership, and a strong commitment to academic and professional excellence.

In her role, she supports the company’s vision of promoting quality research, educational development, and impactful institutional initiatives. Her involvement strengthens the organization’s efforts in guiding students, researchers, and academic professionals.

With a focused and responsible approach, Jyoti Kumari continues to play an important role in the growth of Avaaya Infotech Private Limited and in advancing its mission of innovation, learning, and research support.

×

Dr. Nitish Kumar Singh

Dr. N. K. Singh is a distinguished academician and researcher with a Ph.D. from Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) and a Master’s degree from NITTTR Bhopal. He brings over 10 years of experience in higher education and research, with a strong focus on innovation and academic excellence.

Dr. Singh has made significant contributions to the research community with 50+ publications in SCI/WoS/Scopus-indexed journals, 14 patents, and three authored books. His research work has earned prestigious recognitions, including funding under the SPEAR program and the Raman Research Award (2023) from VIT. He has also been invited as an international speaker at conferences such as ICEME held in Seoul, South Korea.

His expertise spans ultra-lightweight materials, composite materials, advanced welding, and finite element analysis. He has successfully led and contributed to multiple funded research projects as Principal Investigator and Co-Principal Investigator.

Dr. Singh is an active reviewer for reputed international journals including Material Research Express (IOP, SCIE), Open Engineering, and Journal of Mines, Metals & Fuels. He is also a member of leading professional bodies such as the International Association of Advanced Materials (IAAM) and the International Association of Engineers (IAENG).

With a strong vision for innovation and academic excellence, Dr. Singh is committed to guiding researchers, fostering industry–academia collaboration, and advancing high-quality research through Avaaya Infotech Private Limited.

×

Dr. Chandrajeet Kumar

Dr. Chandrajeet Kumar is a visionary leader, researcher, and entrepreneur, serving as the CEO of Avaaya Infotech Private Limited. With a strong academic background and a passion for innovation, he is dedicated to advancing research, education, and professional development at both national and international levels.

Dr. Kumar has extensive experience in academic research, project development, and industry collaboration. He has been actively involved in guiding students, researchers, and professionals in areas such as research methodology, publication, and skill development. His leadership focuses on bridging the gap between academia and industry through practical learning and knowledge exchange.

Under his guidance, Avaaya Infotech Private Limited has grown as a platform that supports research excellence, organizes academic events, and promotes high-quality publications. He strongly believes in empowering young researchers and fostering a culture of innovation, ethics, and continuous learning.

Driven by a commitment to excellence and societal impact, Dr. Chandrajeet Kumar continues to lead initiatives that contribute to academic growth, research advancement, and community development.

×

Dr. Avinash Kumar Namdeo

Dr. Avinash Kumar Namdeo serves as an Advisor to Avaaya Infotech Private Limited. With his valuable academic and professional insight, he contributes to the organization’s vision of promoting research excellence, academic innovation, and quality-driven educational initiatives.

He plays an important role in guiding strategic academic activities, strengthening institutional collaboration, and supporting the development of impactful programs for researchers, students, and faculty members. His advisory support helps the organization maintain its commitment to integrity, innovation, and excellence.

Through his guidance and experience, Dr. Namdeo continues to support Avaaya Infotech Private Limited in its mission to empower the academic and research community and to create meaningful opportunities for learning, professional growth, and knowledge development.
